items.title: 👋 Welcome
notes: <mark>Thanks for stopping by</mark>. This is a timeline of some of my work over the years, with a few highlights mixed in.
Scroll through to explore, the details update as you move through each moment, unfolding as you go.

items.title: ✨ Doing the Work
notes: I'm taking a short break from full-time work to focus on how things actually get built now.
I'm spending the time fully hands-on across design, prototypes, and code, immersing myself in the tools and rebuilding how I turn ideas into real output.

items.title: 💉 GLP-1 Launch
items.description: Original approach through AI exploration to the final shipped experience.
notes: I stepped into the work when it wasn't really landing and pushed to reset the direction.
Built a new vision in under 48 hours, tying product and brand together in a way that finally clicked.
Ended up being the most successful launch to date, ~1200% MoM subscription growth.

items.title: 💊 Subscription Launch
items.description: Hair Loss and ED treatment experiences, from early concepts to final subscription-based flows.
notes: Expanded GoodRx into subscriptions with its first recurring product, starting with ED and later extending to Hair Loss, building the full experience end to end to support ongoing use and predictable revenue.

items.title: 🏠 Homepage Redesign
items.description: From early discovery to final merchandised homepage experience.
notes: Reworked the homepage into a merchandised, retail-style experience aligned with the product and business direction.
Created a clearer front door that better supports discovery and conversion.

items.title: 📱 App IA Redesign
notes: Redesigned the app structure to support product growth and complexity.
Simplified navigation and improved clarity across key flows.

items.title: 📍 Customer Journeys
items.description: The evolution of the customer journey.
notes: Defined end-to-end customer journeys across the product, working with research, illustration, and information design to bring them to life.
Rolled out across PDE teams and company leadership to align on a shared understanding of the experience.

items.title: 🎩 New Look and Feel
items.description: Rapid concepting, workshopping, and iteration to explore and refine the direction.
notes: Rolled out an updated visual system across core product surfaces, using concepting and workshops to push direction, secure company buy-in, and then test and iterate into a more cohesive, scalable system.

items.title: Price Page Refresh
notes: Rebuilt high-traffic surfaces including coupon and pricing pages.
Improved clarity, usability, and decision-making speed.

items.title: Medicine Cabinet
notes: Launched a product focused on ongoing value beyond transactions.
Shifted the experience toward repeat engagement.

items.title: Design Team Rigor
notes: Raised critique standards and working norms across the team.
Created clearer expectations around quality and execution.

items.title: Org Buildout
notes: Built out key roles across content, operations, and leadership.
Strengthened the foundation for scaling the organization.

items.title: Joined GoodRx
notes: Stepped into SVP Product Design role across product and content.
Focused on improving quality and alignment across teams.

items.title: Outreach Redesign
notes: Delivered a new look and feel across the product.
Helped unify a fragmented experience during growth.

items.title: Customer Journeys
notes: Introduced structured journeys across product and go-to-market.
Connected previously siloed experiences.

items.title: International Expansion
notes: Expanded the design team internationally, including the Prague office.
Built a more distributed and scalable team.

items.title: Org Expansion
notes: Added key roles across content and design operations.
Improved team structure and execution at scale.

items.title: Meeting Intelligence
notes: Launched AI-powered meeting intelligence for note-taking and follow-through.
Extended the platform beyond core workflows into meeting capture and synthesis.

items.title: Joined Outreach
notes: Joined Outreach during a period of rapid product and organizational growth.
Started shaping the next phase of design leadership across the platform.

items.title: Lemonade
notes: Launched the company’s first consumer product in under 9 months.
Expanded the business beyond enterprise into new territory.

items.title: Joined Navan
notes: Joined Navan and stepped into a new space at the intersection of travel, product, and brand.
Started defining how design could help scale the company into its next chapter.

items.title: Slack IA
notes: Led foundational information architecture work for scale.
Helped shape how the product could evolve long term.

items.title: Journey Mapping
notes: Rolled out journey mapping across the organization.
Created shared understanding of user experience.

items.title: Future Inbox
notes: Built an experimental inbox concept with executive leadership.
Explored new directions outside the core roadmap.

items.title: Head of Design
notes: Took ownership of design across the product organization.
Led through a major period of growth and expansion.

items.title: Team Operating System
notes: Built operating rigor across systems, ladders, and quality standards.
Enabled the team to scale while maintaining consistency.

items.title: Joined Slack
notes: Joined Slack to help shape the product through a major scale-up phase.
Brought a systems lens to quality, org design, and product direction.

items.title: Streamer Platform Design
notes: Helped design early streaming platform experiences ahead of Disney+.
Helped extend product thinking beyond web and mobile.

items.title: Wallet App
notes: Built an experimental kids allowance and wallet product.
Explored new product directions within Disney Labs.

items.title: Labs Projects
notes: Contributed to early-stage product explorations.
Focused on experimentation and concept development.

items.title: Joined Disney
notes: Joined Disney to work on new platform concepts and early product directions.
Shifted from a smaller company scale into a broader entertainment ecosystem.

items.title: Mobile App
notes: Led the first cross-functional mobile app effort.
Expanded the product beyond web into new usage patterns.

items.title: AWeber Leadership
notes: Built and led the design team across product and brand.
Helped scale the company through a major growth phase.

items.title: Joined AWeber
notes: Joined AWeber and began building across product, marketing, and brand surfaces.
Set the foundation for later team and design leadership work.

items.title: Okayplayer
notes: Early work at the intersection of music, culture, and digital.
